stem:
f(t) = 5,000(0.8)t

The given function f models the number of brochures a museum distributed at the end of each year, where t represents the number of years since the end of 2005, and 0 ≤ t ≤ 6. If y = f(t) is graphed in the ty-plane, which of the following is the best interpretation of the y-intercept of the graph in this context?

answerOptions.content: The minimum estimated number of brochures the museum distributed during the 6 years was about 1,311.
The estimated number of brochures the museum distributed at the end of 2005 was 5,000.
The minimum estimated number of brochures the museum distributed during the 6 years was 5,000.
The estimated number of brochures the museum distributed at the end of 2005 was about 1,311.

rationale: Choice B is correct. The y-intercept is f(0) = 5,000(0.8)0 = 5,000. Since t = 0 corresponds to the end of 2005, this represents the number of brochures distributed at the end of 2005.
